name: What if my employer fires me after I file for neck injury comp in West Valley City?

mainEntity.name: What if my employer fires me after I file for neck injury comp in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Utah law prohibits retaliation for workers' comp claims; you can sue for wrongful termination.** Filing protects job rights.[7] Key factors: Prove timing link; damages include lost wages; file with Labor Commission. Document all interactions. Common in physical jobs; attorney pursues reinstatement or settlement.
